name: Redacted:Genome
short_description: Uncover the truth in a city consumed by mutation as you fight, survive, and adapt in this action-driven survival shooter. Play as Levi, a special ops soldier sent into the chaos, where every battle brings you closer to the secrets buried within.
detailed_description:
Redacted Genome is a survival horror action shooter that blends tense atmosphere, relentless combat, and a gripping mystery at the heart of a city consumed by mutation. Inspired by classic survival horror design, it delivers fast-paced encounters, resource management, and story-driven exploration.

SURVIVE THE CITY OF MUTATION

Play as Levi, a special ops soldier deployed into a District twisted beyond recognition. Grotesque creatures roam the streets, supplies are scarce, and every shadow hides danger. Fight, scavenge, and adapt as you search for the truth behind the outbreak.

FIGHT, ADAPT, ENDURE

Every bullet counts. Use your weapons and gear strategically, manage resources carefully, and make split-second choices to stay alive. The more you push forward, the more dangerous and unpredictable the enemies become—forcing you to change tactics or be overwhelmed.

UNCOVER THE TRUTH

What caused the city to fall? Who—or what—is behind the mutations? Each mission pulls you deeper into the nightmare, revealing fragments of the conspiracy buried within. The story unfolds as you survive, with every encounter bringing you closer to the secrets Levi was sent to uncover.

BUILT AS THE FOUNDATION

This release is the beginning of the Redacted franchise, offering the core survival horror experience while laying the groundwork for what’s to come. Your feedback and your fight for survival will help shape the future of the series.
